name: Maccaroni and Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve with macaroni or your choice of pasta.
2. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan, sauté garlic and onion until tender.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (except cheese) and stir into the garlic mixture.
4. Cook the sauce until it reaches the desired thickness.
5. Ten minutes before serving, stir cheese into the sauce. You can add as much or little Parmesan cheese as you like to your pasta before serving.
6. This dish was brought to our potluck on Thursday and received good feedback.
